## Checklist

- [ ] No proprietary/organization-specific data, hostnames, or people (public threat examples only)
- [ ] No hardcoded AWS account IDs or secrets (use env vars / the `000000000000` placeholder)
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -q` passes offline
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/claims changed (README status matrix stays honest)
- [ ] Defensive scope only; any offensive/simulation step keeps a human-in-the-loop gate
